prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.6 kg; Height 156.9 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.5%; 6 months ago 6.1%; 3 months ago 6.1%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 142mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 123mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.8kg; 9 months ago 61.3kg; 6 months ago 57.8kg; 3 months ago 60.7kg; current 60.6kg), Height (12 months ago 156.9cm; 9 months ago 156.9cm; 6 months ago 156.9cm; 3 months ago 156.9cm; current 156.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 10U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.8mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 2.1mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.6mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 3.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 2mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 603mg/g; 9 months ago 575mg/g; 6 months ago 379mg/g; 3 months ago 514mg/g; current 498mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 185mg/dL; 6 months ago 166mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 176mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
